pages.text: The $(item)Outpost Skyseed$() — $(item)dark oak planks$() around a $(item)crossbow$() and an $(item)iron ingot$(). A pillager watchtower over a caged iron golem, with a loot chest up top.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Dark oak grows on a $(item)Forest$() seed thrown over a $(bold)dark forest$(); iron from a $(item)Rocky$() core.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A wide $(o)pillager watchtower$() of cobblestone and dark oak, ringed by a small camp — tents, an archery target, a campfire and a banner. Walk in through the arched base, past the caged golem, and climb the corner ladder.

$(bold)The pillager room$()$(br)The middle floor is an $(o)enclosed room$() with the $(item)pillager spawner$() and a loot chest — sealed so the pillagers fight you as you climb instead of tumbling off the island. Above it, an open watch platform sits under a pitched roof.

$(bold)The caged golem$()$(br)An $(item)iron golem$() is penned behind dark-oak fences in the centre of the base. Break the cage and it joins the fight, turning on the pillagers — well worth the few seconds it takes.

$(bold)Loot$()$(br)The chest holds the vanilla outpost haul: a $(item)crossbow$(), tripwire hooks, dark oak, iron, an enchanted book, and $(item)ominous bottles$(). Raids are disabled up here, so treat ominous bottles as collectors' loot. Crafted from $(item)dark oak planks$(), a $(item)crossbow$() and an $(item)iron ingot$().
